name: pushover-mcp
description: Pushover notification MCP server for AI agents. Send push notifications and manage emergency-priority messages via the Pushover API.

tools.name: pushover_send_message
tools.description: Send a push notification via the Pushover API

tools.name: pushover_check_receipt
tools.description: Check the status of an emergency-priority notification receipt

tools.name: pushover_cancel_receipt
tools.description: Cancel retries for an emergency-priority notification

tools.name: pushover_cancel_receipt_by_tag
tools.description: Cancel all emergency-priority notifications matching a tag
